purpose: Capture exact API and web Docker build logs in the existing fail-closed Runtime Context Security Gate without changing build commands, scanner policy, pass/fail semantics or production runtime.
acceptance: API and web docker build output is persisted as exact-head artifacts even when the build fails
docker build retains pipefail semantics and any non-zero build exit still fails the job
Trivy scanner and evidence-manifest gates remain fail closed
no Dockerfile, package, lockfile, application or production changes
